## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.6

### Cameras
- Adds the X-Sense WebRTC ticket ICE servers to Home Assistant's native WebRTC browser client configuration.
- Prefetches WebRTC tickets for supported cameras so the browser can receive the same TURN/STUN server data used by the Android app before creating an offer.
- Keeps cached WebRTC ticket data available across native WebRTC session retries instead of clearing it on session close.

### Diagnostics
- Adds debug context for WebRTC client configuration preparation and ticket prefetching, including whether cached ticket ICE servers were available.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for cached and expired WebRTC ticket ICE server handling.
- Confirms the full Python test suite passes with these changes.
